title: CRSS Pack
description: [DISCONTINUED] The CRSS' main server modpacks for playing on the server
body:
## DO NOT USE THIS MODPACK TO PLAY ON CRSS. JOIN ON ANY CLIENT ON THE LATEST VERSION. # CRSS Pack This **was** a modpack for playing on [CRSS](https://crss.blurryface.xyz) with the same mods as most people may be using. ## CRSS Pack is no longer being updated **You don't need to use the CRSS Pack anymore, just use any old instance you have ready.** ## CRSS What is CRSS, you ask? CRSS is a Minecraft SMP that updates to the next major version every month, in an evolution system. You can read more about it on https://crss.cc ## Why? This isn't a required pack for playing on CRSS, but it's the easiest way to both get access to the server, and invite friends over. The packs already come with CRSS on the server list, so it's as easy as downloading this into the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.app) or any other launcher that supports downloading Modpacks from Modrinth.

CRSS by Blryface is marked with CC0 1.0
